chosen_action.title: Deliver the current Codeberg-first manual publisher outreach asset for TLDL

why_this_action.summary: The execution board still listed one truthful do-now asset: the Codeberg-first manual publisher outreach packet for TLDL. Apollo, curator, comparison, StackOverflow, and directory lanes are already inside active review windows, and this specific packet had not yet been delivered in the current review window.

evidence: marketing_execution_board_latest.md listed the manual publisher outreach asset as the best executable asset still waiting
distribution_lane_latest.md named the same manual follow-through lane and said TLDL was the truthful packet to reuse
outreach-log.md had no prior 2026-05-27 delivery entry for the 2026-05-27 manual publisher review asset

result.summary: Delivered the current Codeberg-first TLDL manual outreach packet to the active chat instead of generating another stale packet or fake-progress hold artifact.

expected_outcome: Immediate human-executable publisher outreach to TLDL that can create a Codeberg-first comparison mention or citation.

measurement_window.success_metric: At least one manual contact attempt using the delivered TLDL packet, followed by any reply, citation, backlink, attributable repo inspection, or Codeberg adoption movement.
measurement_window.kill_condition: If no manual send or signal exists by the review checkpoint, replace this lane instead of refreshing the same packet again.
